          (begin

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Underground cave system located. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
Year 63 on Mars. Underground cave system located. Morale is hopeful. We have 314 food units left.
Another year. Underground cave system located. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 63): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
